About

Built for the retail floor and the spreadsheet, equally

Imtiaz has spent six years inside the same organization, InterCloud Limited, moving from front-line customer care into full-scale retail sales leadership. He's comfortable on both sides of the business: resolving a customer's billing dispute in the morning and presenting a market-expansion plan to leadership by afternoon. His strength is process — turning scattered feedback, courier logistics, and order verification into a system his team can run without him watching over their shoulder.

Selected Work

Novocom Retail SMS Portal — Brilliant PBX Lite

An HTML/UI prototype Imtiaz designed for a business SMS sending portal — from choosing an industry template, to building a message, to sending it one at a time or in bulk from a pasted spreadsheet. Built to make bulk customer messaging approachable for non-technical retail staff.

01 — Setup

Select Your Business Type

Lets a customer pick their industry so the portal can suggest ready-made SMS templates for it.
02 — Build

Create New SMS Template

Suggested templates per industry, plus a variable-tagging system for names, dates, and categories.
03 — Single Send

Live Preview & Send

An input panel fills the template live, with a character counter before the message goes out.
04 — Bulk Send

Excel-Paste Bulk Sheet

Paste rows straight from a spreadsheet and schedule or send the whole batch at once.

Click any screen to view it full-size. UI prototype — shown with placeholder/test data.

Selected Work

Brilliant PBX Lite Portal — Business Verification & Document Submission

A live, in-production UI Imtiaz designed for the Brilliant PBX portal's onboarding flow — letting a business submit its verification documents (Trade License, TIN, BIN) or, if it has none yet, proceed with personal ID documents instead. Built to make document collection clear and low-friction for new business customers.

01 — Start

Business Verification

Asks whether the business already has the required documents, branching the flow accordingly.
02 — Documents

Trade License, TIN & BIN Upload

Structured fields and file uploads for each identification document, with certificate previews.
03 — Fallback

Personal ID Fallback

For businesses without formal documents yet, collects NID front/back and a selfie instead, with a self-declared accuracy checkbox.

Click any screen to view it full-size. Live product UI — screenshots shown with test data.

Selected Work · Ongoing

Brilliant Connect — Agent Wallet UI

A mobile-first UI update for the Brilliant Connect Agent Wallet, designed to make daily Top-Up, Recharge, and SMS transactions faster and smoother for Imtiaz's 2-team, 1,400+ agent network. Currently an ongoing, in-production redesign.

01 — Top-Up

Top-Up

Agents move balance between their Brilliant Account and PBX Account by entering an amount and mobile or Brilliant number.
02 — Recharge

Recharge

A simple amount field for topping up the wallet itself, with quick access to recharge history.
03 — SMS

Top-Up / Recharge via SMS

Lets agents complete a Top-Up or Recharge by SMS when they're away from data, using just a PBX account number.
04 — Summary

Account Summary

One glance at balance, bonus earned, referral stats, and due target Top-Up, plus quick PIN management.

Click any screen to view it full-size. Live product UI, currently being rolled out — screenshots shown with test data.

Selected Work

Ticketing System — Issue Categorization & Complaint Form

Imtiaz identified the full range of issues Brilliant customers commonly face, then organized them into clear Groups and Sub-groups inside the ticketing system — so customers can quickly find and file the right complaint. He also authored the content for the customer-facing complaint generation form itself.

01 — Structure

Group & Sub-group List

Ten-plus issue groups (OTP, Blocked Account, NID, Payment, Balance, Network, and more), each broken into specific sub-groups so tickets route correctly the first time.
02 — Complaint Form

Create A New Ticket

The customer-facing form Imtiaz wrote the content for — Group and Subgroup pickers, contact details, description, and file upload for evidence.

Click any screen to view it full-size. Live product UI — screenshots shown with test data.
